description: A template designed for health & wellness companies that asks customers to complete a survey, while offering them a thank you incentive (optional). This can be used for beauty, retail, spa services, etc.

designer.description: Hi! My name is Melissa Hickman. I'm an industrial & organizational psychologist, with several years of digital marketing experience. I focus on UX & aesthetic design. I'm based out of Boulder, Colorado. I love working with eCommerce brands and creating high-converting Shopify stores & email campaigns. Aside from my professional life, I love fitness, nutrition & getting outside with the dogs.

html_data:
THE RESULTS ARE IN

 

Thank you for taking the time to complete our

survey. Here are the results from your fellow earthlings.

 

 
 
 

72%

of customers have tried our Wheatgrass Wonderland Shot

 
 

43%

have a taste for tropics

57%

prefer berry blends

 

Early afternoon is the winning time for a mid-day pick-me-up

 
 
 

Changed your mind? You can unsubscribe at any time.
